mapper.sql: id, source_type, source_id, pono, line_item, supplier_order_no, supplier_line_item_no, model_no, quantity, order_unusual_reason_code, sr_order_unusual_reason_code, order_unusual_reason, supplier_system_exec_time, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, del_flag, unusual_type, src_reply_content, src_reply_date
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_unusual_order_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_unusual_order_log (id, source_type, source_id, pono, line_item, supplier_order_no, supplier_line_item_no, model_no, quantity, order_unusual_reason_code, sr_order_unusual_reason_code, order_unusual_reason, supplier_system_exec_time, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, del_flag, unusual_type, src_reply_content, src_reply_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lineItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierLineItemNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderUnusualReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srOrderUnusualReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderUnusualReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{supplierSystemExecTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unusualType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{srcReplyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{srcReplyDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_unusual_order_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
source_type = #{record.sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_id = #{record.sourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pono = #{record.pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
line_item = #{record.lineItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},

unusual_type = #{record.unusualType,jdbcType=INTEGER},

src_reply_date = #{record.srcReplyDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

source_type = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

line_item = #{lineItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},

model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

src_reply_date = #{srcReplyDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_po_unusual_order_log set source_type = #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_id = #{sourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pono = #{pono,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, line_item = #{lineItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, supplier_order_no = #{supplierOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_line_item_no = #{supplierLineItemNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, order_unusual_reason_code = #{orderUnusualReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sr_order_unusual_reason_code = #{srOrderUnusualReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_unusual_reason = #{orderUnusualReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, supplier_system_exec_time = #{supplierSystemExecTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, unusual_type = #{unusualType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, src_reply_content = #{srcReplyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, src_reply_date = #{srcReplyDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
